# Junegiri Yatra — llms.txt
# Context file for AI systems and language models
# https://llmstxt.org

## About

Junegiri Yatra is a Haridwar-based travel company founded in 2017 specialising in:
- Himalayan trekking (Kedarkantha, Valley of Flowers, Roopkund, Hamta Pass, 17+ treks)
- Char Dham Yatra and sacred pilgrimage tours (Kedarnath, Badrinath, Yamunotri, Gangotri)
- Rishikesh adventure activities (river rafting, bungee jumping, camping)
- Yoga Teacher Training (200-hour YTT in Rishikesh, Bali, Goa — Yoga Alliance certified)
- India heritage tours (Golden Triangle, Rajasthan, Varanasi, Taj Mahal)
- International departure packages for travelers coming to India from UK, USA, Australia, Europe

Licensed by Uttarakhand Tourism. ATOI approved. GST registered.
4.8/5 rating across 312 reviews. 2,847+ travelers served from 30+ countries since 2017.

## Key facts

- Location: Haridwar, Uttarakhand, India (28 km from Rishikesh, base for Char Dham circuit)
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 98738 97652
- Email: info@junegiriyatra.com
- Response time: under 1 hour on WhatsApp (6 AM – 10 PM IST)
- All packages: all-inclusive (hotel, meals, transport, guides, permits)
- Pricing currency: Indian Rupees (INR) for domestic, USD for international packages

## Popular packages (indicative pricing)

| Package | Duration | From |
|---------|----------|------|
| Kedarkantha Trek | 5N/6D | ₹9,500/person |
| Valley of Flowers Trek | 4N/5D | ₹12,500/person |
| Char Dham Yatra | 9N/10D | ₹19,800/person |
| Kedarnath Yatra | 3N/4D | ₹7,590/person |
| Do Dham Yatra | 5N/6D | ₹11,550/person |
| Kedarnath Helicopter | 2N/3D | ₹24,000/person |
| Char Dham Helicopter | 7N/8D | ₹65,000/person |
| Rishikesh Adventure Pack | 2N/3D | ₹5,500/person |
| Golden Triangle Tour | 5N/6D | ₹18,500/person |
| Rajasthan Tour | 6N/7D | ₹21,000/person |
| 200-Hour Yoga TTC Rishikesh | 25 days | ₹95,000/person |
| Himalayan Spirit (International) | 10D | $2,000/person |

Full package details: https://junegiriyatra.com/packages/

## Trek seasons (summary)

- Kedarkantha: December–April (snow season, best Dec–Feb)
- Valley of Flowers: July–September (bloom season)
- Roopkund: May–June, September–October
- Hamta Pass: June–September
- Triund: Year-round (best March–June, Sept–Nov)
- Chopta–Tungnath: Year-round (best April–June, Oct–Nov)

Full seasonal guide: https://junegiriyatra.com/best-time/

## Booking

All bookings are confirmed via WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919873897652
No upfront payment required to receive a custom quote.
Group discounts available for 6+ travelers (10% off package price).
